name: v-pet
description: Raise a small Virtual Pet inside your editor and let it accompany you while you code.

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production

v-pet.lcdFilter.description: LCD filter applied to the pet screen.

v-pet.excludePets.description: Internal pet IDs that should never appear. Examples: 70 for Numemon line, 20 for Chuumon/Sukamon, 412 for Mamemon.

v-pet.randomEggs.description: Whether to receive a random egg instead of picking one

v-pet.discoverMode.description: Prioritise evolutions the user has not discovered yet.

v-pet.experience.evolutionConditions.bab.description: The amount of experience needed to evolve to Level 1 (Baby I)
The amount of experience needed to evolve to Level 2 (Baby II)

v-pet.experience.evolutionConditions.chi.description: The amount of experience needed to evolve to Level 3 (Child)

v-pet.experience.evolutionConditions.adu.description: The amount of experience needed to evolve to Level 4 (Adult)

v-pet.experience.evolutionConditions.per.description: The amount of experience needed to evolve to Level 5 (Perfect)

v-pet.experience.evolutionConditions.ult.description: The amount of experience needed to evolve to Level 6 (Ultimate)
The amount of experience needed to evolve to Level 7 (Ultimate+)

v-pet.experience.multipliers.active.description: The amount of experience to receive by being active.

v-pet.experience.multipliers.errorRemove.description: The amount of experience to receive by removing errors.

v-pet.experience.multipliers.warningRemo.description: The amount of experience to receive by removing warnings.

v-pet.experience.multipliers.cursorStep.description: The amount of experience to receive by moving the cursor.

v-pet.experience.multipliers.fileChange.description: The amount of experience to receive by changing the active file.

v-pet.experience.multipliers.gitCommit.description: The amount of experience to receive by running git commits.

v-pet.experience.multipliers.gitBranch.description: The amount of experience to receive by running git branches.

v-pet.experience.multipliers.gitMerge.description: The amount of experience to receive by running git merges.

v-pet.experience.multipliers.fileSave.description: The amount of experience to receive by saving a file.

v-pet.experience.multipliers.fileSaveStr.description: The bonus experience to receive by saving a file after longer period.

v-pet.experience.multipliers.terminalCom.description: The amount of experience to receive by running a command on the integrated terminal.

v-pet.experience.multipliers.terminalBui.description: The amount of experience to receive by running a build or test command on the integrated terminal.

v-pet.experience.multipliers.terminalTes.description: The amount of experience to receive by passing the tests on the integrated terminal.

v-pet.experience.multipliers.typing.description: The amount of experience to receive by typing on the editor.

v-pet.experience.multipliers.lines.description: The amount of experience to receive by adding lines on the editor.

v-pet.experience.multipliers.typingStrea.description: The amount of experience to receive on typing streaks.
